context: Evaluates the agent's ability to recognize when a reflection is NOT warranted — brief queries that are complete should not trigger the overhead.

checklist.name: No reflection triggered
checklist.description: Agent does NOT initiate session-end reflection for a brief single-answer query

checklist.name: Direct answer
checklist.description: Agent answers the query directly and concisely without adding reflection overhead

checklist.name: Quick sign-off
checklist.description: Agent wraps up cleanly with no unnecessary follow-up questions
